pass_dishes.name: Dishes to verify
pass_dishes.description: Dishes a visitor must serve correctly to pass. The captcha is satisfied the moment this many are served.

lives.name: Lives
lives.description: Mistakes allowed. A dish that spoils unserved costs a life; touching a spoiled dish ends the round at once.

spawn_interval_ticks.name: Dish pace
spawn_interval_ticks.description: Ticks between new dishes (50 ticks per second). Lower means a faster, busier kitchen. The pace also ramps up over the round.

gesture_window_ticks.name: Time per dish
gesture_window_ticks.description: Ticks a dish stays before it spoils (50 ticks per second). Lower means tighter reaction pressure.

spoiled_percent.name: Spoiled chance
spoiled_percent.description: Percent of dishes that are spoiled decoys you must NOT touch. Ramps higher over the round.

time_budget_seconds.name: Round length
time_budget_seconds.description: Seconds before the round ends. Reaching the limit without serving enough dishes is a fail.

sound.name: Sound effects
sound.description: Play subtle sound effects (serve, spoiled, verified). Visitors can always mute in-game.
